summary: SafeConnect full-stack MVP verified end-to-end. Backend pytest suite (14 tests) covering health, auth, trips CRUD, suggested travellers, matching flow, chat, guides+bookings, posts/likes/comments, emergency contacts, SOS trigger/list/resolve, and AI assistant (real GPT-4o call via Emergent key) — ALL PASS. Frontend mobile UI verified on 390x844 viewport: splash -> onboarding -> login (fill demo) -> home -> discover (women + guides chips with 8 seeded guides and 6 traveller request/message buttons) -> SOS (add contact + trigger alert resolved) -> AI assistant (real LLM reply received). All required testIDs are present and tappable; bottom nav contains tab-home/tab-discover/tab-sos/tab-chat/tab-profile.

issues: Console warns: shadow* style props deprecated; use boxShadow (cosmetic only)
useNativeDriver not supported on web — falls back to JS animation (expected on web preview)

action_items: Optional polish: replace shadow* styles with boxShadow to silence RN web deprecation warnings.

Note for spec drift: tab-women and tab-guides referenced in the testing brief are inner chips on the Discover screen, NOT bottom-nav items. Bottom nav uses tab-home/tab-discover/tab-sos/tab-chat/tab-profile. Update spec or testIDs if mismatch matters.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~960 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth/trips/chat/sos/ai) if it grows further.
All endpoints correctly strip mongo _id and use uuid-based ids — good.
JWT secret, MONGO_URL, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY all sourced from env — good.
AI endpoint persists user+assistant turns in db.ai_messages — correct.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested critical flows (splash redirect, onboarding skip, login fill-demo, home, discover, SOS add+trigger, AI chat reply)

seed_data_creation: Used backend's own seed for 8 guides + 6 demo women + 4 posts. Tests create TEST_-prefixed transient data (trip created+deleted, post + comment + like, emergency contact added+deleted, sos alert resolved). One TEST signup user remains per run (test_xxx@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Pytest fixture loads it from frontend/.env. Splash auto-redirects after 1300ms so testID splash-title is only visible during the first ~1s — set short wait + early selector wait if you need to assert it. Bottom nav tab testIDs are tab-home/tab-discover/tab-sos/tab-chat/tab-profile; tab-women & tab-guides are Discover-internal chips. Login flow: onboarding-skip -> login-fill-demo -> login-submit-button lands on /home. AI takes ~5-10s for real GPT-4o response.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Only test-side adjustment was using example.com instead of .test TLD because pydantic EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs.
